title: Timer & Clock
description: This mod displays the current time and a customizable timer directly above the hotbar. It lets you keep track of time without interrupting your gameplay.
body:
This mod adds a clock and timer display directly above the hotbar, allowing players to always see the current time while playing. In addition, it features a fully customizable timer that can be used for challenges, speedruns, or reminders. This helps you manage your time efficiently without having to pause the game.

Commands:

- /timeset12 – switches the clock to the 12-hour format
- /timeset24 – switches the clock to the 24-hour format
- /timeup – starts a timer that counts up
- /timedown <time> – starts a countdown (e.g. 15h40m30s, 1h, 40m)
- /timepause – pauses the current timer or countdown
- /timeresume – resumes the paused timer or countdown
- /timestop – stops the current timer or countdown and shows the clock again
